DataRequest.Name: Windows: Admin User Logon / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detect remote login by Administrator user (depending on internal pattern). This rule is adapted from https://github.com/SigmaHQ/sigma/blob/master/rules/windows/builtin/security/account_management/win_security_admin_rdp_login.yml
DataRequest.DataSource: Microsoft Windows Security Log via OMI or FortiSIEM Agent

SubPattern.name: Administrator_Use
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType="Win-Security-4624" AND authenMethod="Kerberos, NTLM" AND user REGEXP "^Admin"
